autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context before agent runs

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store important user messages after conversations

serverCommand.label: Server Command
serverCommand.help: Path to ragger binary. If set, the plugin will auto-start the HTTP server when it's not running.

mcpCommand.label: MCP Command
mcpCommand.help: Path to ragger binary for MCP fallback (default: "ragger" from PATH)

transport.label: Transport
transport.help: Transport preference: "http" (daemon), "mcp" (spawn per-user), or "auto" (try HTTP, fall back to MCP)
